title: Poljakovia falcatolobata

It has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, inflammation, and cardiovascular diseases, due to its reported health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, Poljakovia falcatolobata is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are commonly consumed to promote health and well-being.
